Game: Pay attention to the order of the moves made

Not only has black NOT been able to get both cannons to reds pawn rank for the Double Pawn Ranked Cannons variation, blacks effort with the left cannon blockade has also been spoilt by red.||||In summary, the order of the moves made is heavily dependent on the ability of the players understanding of the opening, and it would have drastic consequences on the game. This is one area that the beginner MUST pay special attention too.||||Jim: Please compare this outcome with playing C2+4 in the other variation for move one
